issues.description: Effect 1: Trigger is 'OnKO' but should be scoped to only {Thriller Bark Pirates} type Characters. The DSL lacks a target filter for card type.
Target scope 'AllOwnCharacters' is too broad. Should filter for type 'Thriller Bark Pirates' only.
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but card text says 'until the end of your opponent's next End Phase', which requires 'DuringOpponentTurn' (not a simple EndOfTurn). This is a major duration violation.
Effect 2: This 'Trigger' with 'SearchDeck' action is completely absent from the card text. Should not exist.
